answers.body:
You are right about the library not being able to deserialize object into String. You could solve the issue in the following ways:

  • If you expect an arbitrary object in propertiesJson property you could make it of type Map<String, Object> in your ConfigurationProperties class.

  • If propertiesJson can be of any type(like number, string, array, object) you could make it of type Object. In such case ObjectMapper would deserialize the value into an object of the json type's respective counterpart in Java.

title: Cannot deserialize value of type `java.lang.String` from Object value (token `JsonToken.START_OBJECT`)
body:
I have one class called Configurations

public class Configurations {

private List<Configuration> configurations; 
}

public class Configuration {
    private String configurationClass;
    private ConfigurationProperties configurationProperties;
}

public class ConfigurationProperties {
    private String propertiesClass;
    private String propertiesJson;
}

public class SchoolProperties {
    @JsonProperty("serviceName")
    String serviceName;

    @JsonProperty("operationName")
    String operationName;

    @JsonProperty("latency")
    Long latency;

    @JsonProperty("permittedTransactionsPerSecond")
    int permittedTransactionsPerSecond;

    Class<? extends Throwable>[] possibleExceptions;
}

there is one more class called ConfigurationProperties like below :-

Now i'm passing a Json-Object like below:-

  input =   "{
        "configurations": [{
            "configurationClass": "src.myProject.OperationHandler",
            "configurationProperties": {
                "propertiesClass": "src.myProjects.schoolProperties",
                "propertiesJson": {
                    "serviceName": "SchoolAdministerService",
                    "operationName": "handleAdmission",
                    "latency": "25",
                    "permittedTransactionsPerSecond": "50",
                    "possibleExceptions": ["java.io.IOException", "java.net.SocketException", "java.net.SocketTimeoutException"]
                }
            }
        }]
    }";

  type = "Configurations.class";

When i'm trying to deserialize it with below way, it's getting failed:-

ObjectMapper objectMapper = new ObjectMapper();

objectMapper.readValue(input, type);

After running this de-serialization logic, this is getting failed with below-error:-

    Caused by: com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.exc.MismatchedInputException: Cannot deserialize value of type `java.lang.String` from Object value (token `JsonToken.START_OBJECT`)
at [Source: (String)"{"configurations":[{"configurationClass":"src.myProject.OperationHandler","configurationProperties":{"propertiesClass":"src.myProjects.schoolProperties","propertiesJson":{
                "serviceName": "SchoolAdministerService",
                "operationName": "handleAdmission",
                "latency": "25",
                "permittedTransactionsPerSecond": "50",
                "possibleExceptions": ["java.io.IOException", "java.net.SocketException", "java.net.SocketTimeoutException"]
            } (through reference chain: Configurations["configurations"]->java.util.ArrayList[0]->Configuration["configurationProperties"]->ConfigurationProperties["propertiesJson"])

I think the issue is because it's trying to capture propertiesJson as String, but this is not given as string, this is a object. Can someone help, how we should de-serialize it.

Thanks !
